## 🛑 Security Checklist
- [ ] I have thoroughly reviewed my Flow JSON and removed ALL hardcoded secrets, API keys, passwords, client IDs, and sensitive company data.
- [ ] I have replaced any sensitive values with generic placeholders (e.g., `<YOUR_API_KEY>`).

## 📋 Submission Checklist
- [ ] I have placed my example in the correct category directory.
- [ ] I have included a local `README.md` inside my example folder using the repository's template.
- [ ] I have tested this Flow code in my own environment and verify that it works as described.
